channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 71/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 71/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 65.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Will Labour’s leadership hopefuls reverse Brexit? What Burnham and Streeting have said about rejoining the EU
item.description: Will Labour’s leadership hopefuls reverse Brexit? What Burnham and Streeting have said about rejoining the EU

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham plays down rejoining EU after Streeting advocates Brexit reversal
item.description: Burnham plays down rejoining EU after Streeting advocates Brexit reversal

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour leadership talk ‘froth and nonsense’, says senior minister – as it happened
item.description: Labour leadership talk ‘froth and nonsense’, says senior minister – as it happened

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Streeting reopening Brexit wars by calling for UK return to EU ‘a bit odd,’ says Nandy
item.description: Politics latest: Streeting reopening Brexit wars by calling for UK return to EU ‘a bit odd,’ says Nandy

item.title: BBC Politics: Personal decision for Starmer on whether to fight leadership contest, minister says
item.description: Personal decision for Starmer on whether to fight leadership contest, minister says

item.title: i Politics: ‘You don’t cross Wes’: The real Streeting – by those who know him
item.description: ‘You don’t cross Wes’: The real Streeting – by those who know him

item.title: The Guardian: Culture secretary says Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU is ‘odd’ - The Guardian
item.description: Culture secretary says Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU is ‘odd’ - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Culture secretary says Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU is ‘odd’
item.description: Culture secretary says Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU is ‘odd’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham expected to drop call to reverse Brexit as poll shows voters divided on PM prospects
item.description: Burnham expected to drop call to reverse Brexit as poll shows voters divided on PM prospects

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting: I’ll stand for Labour leadership – and Britain must rejoin EU
item.description: Wes Streeting: I’ll stand for Labour leadership – and Britain must rejoin EU
